headline: EMCOR GROUP INC (NYSE:EME) Passes the Caviar Cruise Screen with Stellar Quality Metrics
summary: EMCOR Group passes the Caviar Cruise quality screen with a 145% ROIC, 26% EBIT growth, and minimal debt. See why this high-quality company scores 7/10 on fundamentals.
